title: Connecting more than 50 boards to a dashboard
excerpt: My organisation would like to see that it’s possible to connect more than 50 boards to 1 dashboard. We want to use a projectmanagement tool like Monday for overall insights in our organisation. Because of this it is for …

posts.author: Demi_Customeyes (Demi)
posts.cookedHtml: My organisation would like to see that it’s possible to connect more than 50 boards to 1 dashboard. We want to use a projectmanagement tool like Monday for overall insights in our organisation. Because of this it is for us neccesary to be able to connect all over our individuel project plannings (boards) to 1 overall dashboard. Only in this way it’s possible for us to get insights in the total workload for our employees and organisation and the agenda of our organisation (when will we be very busy and when not).

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Demi_Customeyes, take a look at our app Master Data - Mint Consulting. I use it internally to manage daily timelogs for multiple teams (which I should really be using a workload report for ). It doesn’t have connection limits :).

posts.author: Isa1bella1 (Bella M )
posts.cookedHtml: I Agree. The connected board limitation is outdated. Any other CMS have allows for unlimited.

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Isa1bella1 If an add-on is an option, I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful, which provides 15 different chart types that can aggregate data from any number of boards (depending on the plan). The charts an be placed on Monday dashboard or shared via email or Slack.

You can learn more from the Getting Started guide.
